query:
SELECT s.id, s.sceneIndex, s.mvSceneStatus, s.errorMessage, s.updatedAt
FROM musicVideoScenes s
WHERE s.id IN (510038, 510043, 510070, 510071, 510073, 510074)
ORDER BY s.sceneIndex;
command:

WHERE s.id IN (510038, 510043, 510070, 510071, 510073, 510074)
